calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S Firsr Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judical Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
PAM UNDERWOOD FOR PETITIONER AND MOVING PARTY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents (set #1) is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to serve complete responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
